title: File Uploads Failing / Cancelling
excerpt:

posts.author: SheilaJ (Sheila )
posts.cookedHtml:
Is anyone else having issues across their account with uploads failing?
We cannot upload anything other than photographs anywhere into Monday.com, The file column, comments box or the Monday Doc column. Neither can we view anything that is already uploaded other than photographs.
This has been going on for almost 5 weeks now and I don’t know how much longer it is going to be before it is resolved… We have an email from the 9th July saying the issue had been identified and the Developers were working to get it resolved but it is affecting our whole business now and I am starting to get a lot of complaints from people as we have auditors in.

posts.author: SheilaJ (Sheila )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi John, thank you for your reply but I am not sure if it is on the wrong thread? It appears to be regarding logging in and my post is about Files not uploading / cancelling.
Thanks anyway
